description_long: This object is a classic jukebox, featuring a rounded top and a wooden exterior with a rich, dark finish. The front is adorned with a colorful illuminated arch in shades of blue, pink, and orange, framing a central display area with a glass window and visible selection buttons. Below the display, there is a decorative speaker grille with a lattice pattern and metallic accents, including a prominent red star motif. The sides and back are plain, showcasing the wood grain, while the front is highly detailed and visually striking. The base is slightly raised and finished in a darker color, providing stability and a sense of weight. This type of jukebox is typically found in public urban spaces such as diners, arcades, or retro-themed venues.
description: A vintage-style jukebox with a wooden body, colorful illuminated arch, and decorative front grille, commonly found in public urban spaces.
description_view_0: Side view showing the curved wooden panel and a glimpse of the illuminated front arch.
description_view_1: Front view displaying the colorful arch, central display, selection buttons, and ornate speaker grille.
description_view_2: Opposite side view, similar to view 0, with the curved wooden panel and partial illumination visible.
description_view_3: Rear view showing a plain, unadorned wooden surface with no visible controls or decorations.
